title: HTTP Request node execution failed due to API rate limits
symptom: The HTTP Request node fails with a 'Node Execution Failed' error when the API rate limit is exceeded.
applies_when: Making multiple API calls in quick succession
not_this_if: Error is related to data issues or missing credentials
root_cause: The error occurs when the number of API requests exceeds the allowed limit set by the API provider, resulting in the API rejecting further requests until the limit resets.
fix_steps: Add a Wait node with a delay of 1 second or more
Reduce the batch size in the HTTP Request node to a manageable number
agent_instruction: Implement a Wait node to manage API request timing and reduce the batch size in the HTTP Request node.
